questions.question: Describe the main advantages of using the chalk and talk method over PowerPoint presentations in a mathematics classroom. (5 marks)
What is the purpose of using visual aids like diagrams and graphs in PowerPoint presentations for teaching metric spaces? (5 marks)
Explain how a lecturer can use the PowerPoint presentation method to cater to students with different learning styles, such as visual and auditory learners, while teaching metric spaces. (10 marks)
